snippet.title: Peter Zaffino on the $180 Billion AIG Bailout
snippet.description: AIG Chairman and CEO Peter Zaffino talks about the government bailout that kept AIG afloat after the 2008 financial crisis.

snippet.description: AIG chief executive officer Peter Zaffino sees opportunities and challenges with the introduction of AI to the insurance industry.

snippet.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peter Zaffino
snippet.description: AIG Chairman and CEO Peter Zaffino talks about the insurance giant's turnaround and AI's impact on his industry. He speaks on "The David Rubenstein Show: Peer-to-Peer Conversations". This interview was recorded October 16 in New York.

localized.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peter Zaffino
localized.description: AIG Chairman and CEO Peter Zaffino talks about the insurance giant's turnaround and AI's impact on his industry. He speaks on "The David Rubenstein Show: Peer-to-Peer Conversations". This interview was recorded October 16 in New York.

snippet.title: Peter Zaffino on the $180 Billion AIG Bailout
snippet.description: AIG Chairman and CEO Peter Zaffino talks about the government bailout that kept AIG afloat after the 2008 financial crisis. He says the government did make a profit on the package. He speaks on "The David Rubenstein Show: Peer-to-Peer Conversations". This interview was recorded October 16 in New York.

localized.title: Peter Zaffino on the $180 Billion AIG Bailout
localized.description: AIG Chairman and CEO Peter Zaffino talks about the government bailout that kept AIG afloat after the 2008 financial crisis. He says the government did make a profit on the package. He speaks on "The David Rubenstein Show: Peer-to-Peer Conversations". This interview was recorded October 16 in New York.

snippet.title: AIG CEO Peter Zaffino Talks AI, Geopolitics and Climate Change | Bloomberg Talks
snippet.description:
AIG chief executive officer Peter Zaffino sees opportunities and challenges with the introduction of AI to the insurance industry. He speaks on that and more with host David Rubenstein, on "The David Rubenstein Show: Peer-to-Peer Conversations", as seen on Bloomberg Television.

See omnystudio.com/listener (https://omnystudio.com/listener) for privacy information.


Bloomberg Talks curates top interviews from around Bloomberg News. Hear conversations with the biggest names in finance, politics and entertainment. On Bloomberg Talks, we round up interviews with Fortune 500 CEOs, government officials, well-known investors and business leaders.
